name: Boca Raton Golf & Racquet Club
address: 17751 Boca Club Blvd, Boca Raton, FL 33487
about: The Boca Raton Golf & Racquet Club is an 18-hole premier golf course managed by the City of Boca Raton. It offers a premium golf experience for both experienced and new players. The facility is continuously being improved with over $7 million invested in upgrades including course renovations, clubhouse remodeling, and landscaping. Beyond the course, the club provides a driving range, practice putting green, and a golf simulator for year-round play. The on-site dining is available at the SW Grill, complemented by amenities like electric golf cart rentals, bar service, and a pro shop with club fitting services.
why_golfers_like_it: A premier 18-hole course offering a high-quality experience for all skill levels
Continuous $7 million investment in facility improvements and course upgrades
Comprehensive amenities including a driving range, putting green, and on-site golf simulator

food_and_drink.notes: On-site dining available at SW Grill
Bar cart service available on the course

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available. The facility also offers club fitting services at its pro shop.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The on-site SW Grill provides dining options. A bar cart is also available on the course for drinks, but outside food and drink policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific information on the time required for a full 18-hole round.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility offers junior golf programs and camps, making it suitable for families and youth players.
